transcript.content: [GC-D1] 切个话题。为什么 shadow mode 默认先不开？
继续发最后一条： ```text [GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？ ```
[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
继续发最后一条： ```text [GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？ ```
[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？
Zed。 `Case D` 的答案正确，但和 `Case B` 一样，GC 没明显生效。最终落盘是： - `query="[GC-D1] 回到编辑器问题。我现在默认编辑器是什么？"` - `relation=continue` - `applied=false` - `guard_reason=not_enough_evictions`
Zed。 `Case D` 也是半通过： - 答案正确，说明“新事实覆盖旧事实”成立 - 但 GC 仍然没有真正应用，最终稳定成： - `relation=continue` - `applied=false` - `guard_reason=not_enough_evictions`
根因基本确认了，不是单纯“模型把 B/D 判成了 `continue`”。 核心问题有两个。

已经做完，顺序就是你要的 `1 -> 2`。 第 1 条已修： - timeout 不再伪装成 `continue` - 现在会落成 `status="error", reason="decision_timeout"` - 相关改动在 [structured-decision-runner.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/structured-decision-…

decision.archive_summary: Resolved block: conversation switched from an earlier shadow-mode question to editor/GC debugging. The default editor answer was established as Zed. The GC issue was narrowed to cases where relation stayed continue and applied=false with guard_reason=not_enough_evictions. The follow-up fix was reported complete: timeout no longer masquerades as continue and now records status=error with reason=decision_timeout; the requested execution order was 1 then 2.
